notes: Supabase CLI migration list confirms the seven unrecovered remote-only versions remain present.
The CLI output also shows alignment irregularities around 202604280001-202604290005, so distinct-set comparison should not be treated as a clean baseline proof without direct SQL inventory.

ownership_columns_pre_check.inspection_source: remote generated types via `supabase gen types typescript --project-id zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm --schema public`

drift_classification.reason: Authoritative inventory of indexes, constraints, triggers, RLS policies, enums, and full view/function definitions could not be collected reliably.

anomalies.detail: Direct DB host introspection through SUPABASE_DB_URL still fails DNS resolution for db.zfzdnfwdarxucxtaojxm.supabase.co.
Read-only `supabase db dump --linked --schema public --file ...` failed because local Docker Desktop / pg_dump path is unavailable.
CLI `supabase inspect db table-stats` and `index-stats` timed out; `role-stats` failed during scan, preventing reliable catalog-level inventory.
Without direct SQL execution or schema dump, unknown drift cannot be ruled in or out for indexes, constraints, triggers, RLS policies, enums, and function/view definitions.

operator_action_required: Restore a trustworthy read-only schema inspection path before baseline reconciliation. Acceptable paths include Supabase MCP execute_sql, working psql/pg_dump access through the pooler, or a Docker-backed Supabase schema dump workflow.
